title: User Guides - Onboarding > Fit test for currently connected device
scenario: Fit test can be started for connected Poly Voyager Free 60/60+/20 via App Settings > User Guides > Onboarding section
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Voyager Free 60/60+/20 device is connected to the app.
3. Tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) or navigate to the Home screen.
4. Tap on 'User Guides' from the app menu.
5. Tap on the 'Onboarding' section within User Guides.
6. Verify that the Fit test option is displayed and can be started for the currently connected device.
expected: The Fit test can be started for the currently connected Poly Voyager Free 60/60+/20 device via App Settings > User Guides > Onboarding section.
